'''The Stack''' was an abandoned building in [[Salis D'aar/Legends|Salis D'aar]], [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] that served as headquarters of the [[Freedom resistance movement]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
*[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee'' abridged audiobook]]
